subcodes.first_line: O learned one of the divine school! Thy numerous letters were perused, and their contents became a cause of astonishment, in that [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ادیب دبستان الهی مکاتیب متعدده آنحضرت ملاحظه گردید و مضامین سبب حیرت شد که
subcodes.subjects: @contention and conflict, @unity; oneness of humanity, @humility; meekness; lowliness
